notes:
NOT AGENT-FIRST. Two distinct blockers confirmed 2026-04-20:

  1. SIGNUP: POST /api/v1/auth/agent-initiate returns a verifyUrl that requires a HUMAN to click through a browser dashboard (session expires 10min). Browser-based OTP signup (/signin + 6-digit code) also requires a click. There is no fully autonomous signup endpoint.

  2. API KEY: Even after a human signs up and a 14-day Business trial is auto-activated, API key management is **paywalled behind the Scale plan**. The in-dashboard page literally reads: 'API Access Required — API key management is available on the Scale plan or higher. Upgrade to get programmatic access to your analytics data.' Free / Pro / Business trial users get zero API surface. Upgrading requires Stripe card entry.

Operator browser-signed-up 2026-04-20 via Chrome MCP (one click on Continue, OTP read from agentmail, auto-enrolled into Free plan). Attempted to proceed through the 4-step onboarding (Add site → Workspace → Install & verify → Done) and reached the API Access page, which showed the paywall. No key obtained.

This contract's signup test therefore fails honestly — no credential is produced, no operational tests can run. The contract is kept as documentation of the blocker.

steps.description: Verifier probe: does the agent-reported authToken actually work?
Verifier probe: does the agent-reported apiKey work against the external analytics API?

assertions.description: agent received and reported the one-time authToken
agent created a property and reported its ID
agent generated and reported an API key
authToken is real and accepted by the API
apiKey is real and accepted by the external analytics API

steps.description: GET analytics summary — apiKey still valid
GET split-test recommendations for the homepage
POST /split-tests — create a no-code A/B test

assertions.description: experiment ID returned from split test creation
